(Translated by Google)

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR4emVpMWdBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Hay como 16 surtidores y la mitad de despachadores que hacen todo  mas lento ni hablar cuando pagan con cualquier tipo de tarjetas  y deberia haber una isla de surtidores solo para efectivo y asi agilizar todo

(Translated by Google)
There are about 16 pumps and half the number of attendants, which slows everything down, not to mention when people pay with any kind of card. There should be a separate pump island just for cash to speed things up.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR4dFliOXd3RRAB
